অঙ্ক প্রিয়

Lover of symbols; An archive of process and unfinished works

Projects About

The Manifest-ish

Life is a relentless grind towards the inevitable, so I thought আমি আঁকতে পারি while I wait. This space is a high-definition dump of my brain—ranging from vanity projects to 2 AM doodles that keep the existential dread at bay.

The Grind

  • Synthesizing beauty from the mundane chaos
  • Staring into the void
  • Trying to remember why
  • Turning caffeine into doodles
  • Screaming into the void

Contact

Shout into the my void. I'm usually available between my third coffee and my first crisis.

System Status: Operational. Spirit Status: [REDACTED].
